title: geranium sanguineum var. sanguineiforme
intro: Geranium sanguineum var. sanguineiforme, also known as the bloody cranesbill, is a variety of the geranium sanguineum plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of tannins and glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and even help to treat certain skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Geranium sanguineum var. sanguineiforme include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or externally to harness its medicinal properties.
